Table DIM_GCTS_OPTION

Card of table DIM_GCTS_OPTION

Name

DIM_GCTS_OPTION

Code

DIM_GCTS_OPTION

DBMS

ANSI Level 2


Description of the table DIM_GCTS_OPTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dim will base on:
select * from DB_CONS_STG_DEV.STG_GCTS.V_GCTS_OPTIONS where _ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG=true
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Unique row will be defined by:
variableid+COUNTRYCATEGORYID+RESPONSENAME on source side
variableid_bk+COUNTRYCATEGORYID_BK+RESPONSENAME_BK on target side

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Columns mapping:
DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY<- MD5(variableid||COUNTRYCATEGORYID||RESPONSENAME)
variableid_bk <- variableid
COUNTRYCATEGORYID_BK <- COUNTRYCATEGORYID
RESPONSENAME_BK <- RESPONSENAME
Other: 1:1

SCD1, unique business key: variableid+COUNTRYCATEGORYID+RESPONSENAME


Check constraint name of the table DIM_GCTS_OPTION

CKT_DIM_GCTS_OPTION


Server validation rule of the table DIM_GCTS_OPTION

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DIM_GCTS_OPTION

drop index DIM_GCTS_OPTION_PK;

drop table DIM_GCTS_OPTION cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DIM_GCTS_OPTION
--==============================================================
create table DIM_GCTS_OPTION (
DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY CHAR(254) not null,
VARIABLEID_BK CHAR(254),
COUNTRYCATEGORYID_BK CHAR(254),
RESPONSENAME_BK CHAR(254),
QUESTIONCODE CHAR(254),
RESPONSELABEL CHAR(254),
_ETL_LOAD_DATETIME DATE,
_ETL_RUN_ID NUMERIC,
_ETL_JOB_ID NUMERIC,
primary key (DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY)
);

--==============================================================
-- Index: DIM_GCTS_OPTION_PK
--==============================================================
create unique index DIM_GCTS_OPTION_PK on DIM_GCTS_OPTION (
DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY ASC
);
